task_description: Revamp UI style of 4 games (Intuition, Logical, Trivia, Tarot) in the Android app to match the web frontend. Add background images, sound effects, and themed styling from mystical-nusa.web.id assets. Do NOT modify any game logic.

verification.summary: No Android SDK available in sandbox so build/tests cannot run. Verified: (1) No ViewModel/data layer files modified (git diff confirms 0 changes). (2) All 4 game screens have correct ViewModel calls preserved. (3) New files (SoundManager.kt, GameBackground.kt) have valid Kotlin structure. (4) Color.kt only received additions. (5) All image/sound URLs correctly use https://mystical-nusa.web.id base URL.
